a: Bob Tokyo, the bigg, JohnBob, Deratiseur
sum: This mod adds a merchant, the Lady of Mysteries, worshipper of Mystra, who sells a magic manual giving access to some thirty divine spells, including one never seen before.

new:
Book
The cover of this heavily bound volume is decorated with symbols of Mystra, the Lady of the Weave.
Eh? You talk funny! Bugger off you!

no: Adds a cleric spell merchant and spell items to BG2. Single component. English, Italian, French, Spanish, Russian.

co.n:
[ORIGINAL]
- Accessible at the beginning 
- 100% chance of losing 2 points of Dexterite and Constitution
